title: Pending Proposal Sidecar Metadata
description: The companion metadata file that may sit alongside a pending proposal's human-readable body. inspect_pending_updates reads this to answer triage questions without opening the proposal body; discard_update moves it into the rejected directory rather than deleting it. Sidecars exist only for memory_update and state_update proposals moving through the pending review lifecycle; append_session_note writes directly and has no sidecar.

filename.description: The sidecar file's own logical filename, colocated with the pending proposal body it describes.

target_file.description: A logical repo-independent relative target. Runtime implementations must map it through a server-owned allowlist. Restricted to memory or state, since only memory_update and state_update proposals carry a pending sidecar.

rationale.description: Carried over from the proposal at creation time; explains why the change was proposed.

proposed_at.description: Timestamp when the proposal (and this sidecar) was created.

snapshot_digest.description: Content digest of the proposal body at the time this sidecar was written.
